meta.title: Second prototype of China's tri-engine stealth fighter emerges
meta.description:
As far as we can tell, this story was broken by RepprechtDeino on Twitter/X:
https://x.com/RupprechtDeino

A second J-36 prototype has broken cover to begin flight testing, and it comes with some pretty significant changes from the original design. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
